decisions.decision: Mock useSession at module level via vi.mock('@/features/session/context') to control isConfigured and session values per test
alternatives_rejected: Manipulating localStorage/SessionProvider state to drive configured vs unconfigured paths — more complex, less explicit control

decisions.decision: Mock useProbabilityEdit from '@/lib/query/hooks' directly to return controlled mutation state objects (isPending, isSuccess, isError, data, error)
alternatives_rejected: Mocking '@/lib/api/client' and testing through real react-query mutation lifecycle — harder to control deterministic mutation states per test case

decisions.decision: No polyfill or mock needed for crypto.randomUUID — available in Node.js test environment
alternatives_rejected: Adding a global mock or polyfill for crypto.randomUUID — unnecessary since Node 19+ includes it

decisions.decision: Use separate test cases for success message and error message rendering
alternatives_rejected: Combining success/error assertions into a single form submission test — less clear, harder to debug failures

decisions.decision: Use fireEvent.change for slider and select interactions, consistent with existing test patterns
alternatives_rejected: Using @testing-library/user-event — not installed, would add inconsistent dependency pattern

decisions.decision: Use renderWithProviders from helpers.tsx for rendering, since vi.mock overrides useSession regardless of SessionProvider in the tree
alternatives_rejected: Custom wrapper with just QueryClientProvider — works but diverges from established test patterns

steps.task: Create frontend/src/__tests__/TradingPanel.test.tsx with vi.mock setup for '@/features/session/context' and '@/lib/query/hooks', mock data fixtures (market object with outcomes/marginals), and helper to configure mock return values per test
Write test: 'shows setup message when session is not configured' — mock useSession returning isConfigured:false, assert 'Set your Account ID' text is rendered and form is not present

Write test: 'renders trading form when session is configured' — mock useSession returning isConfigured:true with session data, assert form elements are present (outcome select with market outcomes, probability slider, submit button with 'Submit Edit')
Write test: 'updates probability display when slider changes' — use fireEvent.change on range input, assert formatProbability output updates in the label
Write test: 'calls mutation.mutate with correct payload on form submission' — submit the form, assert mutate was called with accountId, variableId, outcomeId, probability, and idempotencyKey
Write test: 'disables submit button and shows Submitting text when mutation is pending' — mock useProbabilityEdit returning isPending:true, assert button is disabled and shows 'Submitting…'
Write test: 'shows success message with orderId when mutation succeeds' — mock useProbabilityEdit returning isSuccess:true with data.order.orderId, assert 'Order accepted: {orderId}' is rendered
Write test: 'shows error message when mutation fails' — mock useProbabilityEdit returning isError:true with error object, assert error message is rendered
Run vitest on TradingPanel.test.tsx to verify all tests pass, fix any issues
